description_long: This seafood shop is a small, two-story brick commercial building with a flat roof and a prominent, weathered facade. The front features large, bold signage reading 'FISH' in blue and white, with additional graffiti and a smaller sign for 'Chinese Takeaway' above the entrance. The ground floor has a recessed entryway with blue double doors, flanked by display windows and a yellow safety railing along the sidewalk. A scooter is parked to the side, and the building sits on a black base simulating a street with a yellow road line. The upper story is plain with faded pink and blue paint, and the roof is bordered by short parapet walls. No seafood displays or nautical decorations are visible from the exterior.
description: A small, weathered brick seafood shop with bold 'FISH' signage, blue doors, and a flat roof, set on a simulated urban street corner.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'FISH' signage, blue double doors, yellow railing, and the main entrance with a scooter parked to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the plain pink and blue painted wall, the scooter, and the edge of the awning over the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly blank wall with faded paint and the back of the parapet roof, with the 'FISH' sign partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the plain wall, the awning extending from the front, and the yellow road line along the street.
attribute_storefront_signage: The storefront features large, blocky 'FISH' signage in blue and white, painted directly onto the brick facade. There is also a smaller sign reading 'Chinese Takeaway' in yellow and white above the entrance, with some graffiti and faded paint. The signage is bold, weathered, and visually prominent, with no logos or symbols beyond the text.
attribute_architectural_style: Utilitarian urban commercial style with a flat roof, brick construction, and minimal decorative elements; facade is functional and slightly weathered.
